```
    14	function createCellEditor(): LexicalEditor {
```

```
    16	
    17	export interface ShiroEditorProps extends Omit<
    18	  RichEditorProps,
    19	  'rendererConfig' | 'extraNodes' | 'actions'
    20	> {
    21	  extraNodes?: Array<Klass<LexicalNode>>

    27	  extraNodes,
    28	  actions,
    29	  children,
    30	  selfHostnames,
    31	  ...props
    32	}: ShiroEditorProps) {

    34	    () =>

    36	    [extraNodes],
    37	  )
    38

    43	      rendererConfig={enhancedEditRendererConfig}
    44	      actions={

    46	          <SlashMenuPlugin />
    47	          {actions}
    48	        </>
    49	      }

    51	      <TldrawPlugin />
    52	      <EmbedPlugin selfHostnames={selfHostnames} />
    53	      {children}
    54	    </RichEditor>
```

```
    18	export class GridContainerNode extends ElementNode {

    21

    38	    div.className = 'rich-grid-container'

    40	    div.style.gridTemplateColumns = `repeat(${this.__cols}, 1fr)`
    41	    div.style.gap = this.__gap
    42	    return div
    43	  }
    44	
    45	  updateDOM(prevNode: GridContainerNode, dom: HTMLElement): boolean {
    46	    if (prevNode.__cols !== this.__cols) {
    47	      dom.style.gridTemplateColumns = `repeat(${this.__cols}, 1fr)`
```

```
     9	} from 'lexical'
    10	import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'
    11	import { createPortal } from 'react-dom'
    12	
    13	import { GridToolbar } from './GridToolbar'
    14	
    15	function $findGridAncestor(node: LexicalNode | null) {
    16	  let current = node
    17	  while (current) {
    18	    if ($isGridContainerNode(current)) return current
    19	    current = current.getParent()
    20	  }
    21	  return null
    22	}
    23	
    24	export function GridPlugin() {
    25	  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    26	  const [activeGridKey, setActiveGridKey] = useState<string | null>(null)
    27	  const [gridElement, setGridElement] = useState<HTMLElement | null>(null)
    28	  const [portalContainer, setPortalContainer] = useState<HTMLDivElement | null>(
    29	    null,
    30	  )
    31	  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement | null>(null)
    32	
    33	  const updateActiveGrid = useCallback(() => {
    34	    const selection = $getSelection()
    35	    if (!$isRangeSelection(selection)) {
    36	      setActiveGridKey(null)
    37	      setGridElement(null)
    38	      return
    39	    }
    40	
    41	    const anchorNode = selection.anchor.getNode()
    42	    const grid = $findGridAncestor(anchorNode)
    43	
    44	    if (grid) {
    45	      const key = grid.getKey()
    46	      setActiveGridKey(key)
    47	      setGridElement(editor.getElementByKey(key))
    48	    } else {
    49	      setActiveGridKey(null)
    50	      setGridElement(null)
    51	    }
    52	  }, [editor])
    53	
    54	  useEffect(() => {
    55	    return editor.registerCommand(
    56	      SELECTION_CHANGE_COMMAND,
    57	      () => {
    58	        updateActiveGrid()
    59	        return false
    60	      },
    61	      COMMAND_PRIORITY_LOW,
    62	    )
    63	  }, [editor, updateActiveGrid])
    64	
    65	  useEffect(() => {
    66	    if (!gridElement) {
    67	      if (containerRef.current) {
    68	        containerRef.current.remove()
    69	        containerRef.current = null
    70	      }
    71	      setPortalContainer(null)
    72	      return
    73	    }
    74	
    75	    let container = containerRef.current
    76	    if (!container || container.parentElement !== gridElement) {
    77	      if (container) container.remove()
    78	      container = document.createElement('div')
    79	      container.style.position = 'absolute'
    80	      container.style.top = '0'
    81	      container.style.left = '0'
    82	      container.style.right = '0'
    83	      container.style.pointerEvents = 'none'
    84	      gridElement.appendChild(container)
    85	      containerRef.current = container
    86	      setPortalContainer(container)
    87	    }
    88	
    89	    return () => {
    90	      if (containerRef.current) {
    91	        containerRef.current.remove()
    92	        containerRef.current = null
    93	      }
    94	      setPortalContainer(null)
    95	    }
    96	  }, [gridElement])
    97	
    98	  if (!activeGridKey || !portalContainer) return null
    99	
   100	  return createPortal(
   101	    <GridToolbar nodeKey={activeGridKey} editor={editor} />,
   102	    portalContainer,
   103	  )
   104	}
```

```
     1	import { $isGridContainerNode } from '@shiro/rich-editor'
     2	import type { LexicalEditor } from 'lexical'
     3	import { $createParagraphNode, $getNodeByKey } from 'lexical'
     4	import { LayoutGrid, Minus, Plus } from 'lucide-react'
     5	import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     6	
     7	import * as cls from './styles.css'
     8	
     9	interface GridToolbarProps {
    10	  nodeKey: string
    11	  editor: LexicalEditor
    12	}
    13	
    14	const COL_OPTIONS = [1, 2, 3, 4] as const
    15	
    16	export function GridToolbar({ nodeKey, editor }: GridToolbarProps) {
    17	  const [currentCols, setCurrentCols] = useState(2)
    18	
    19	  useEffect(() => {
    20	    return editor.registerUpdateListener(({ editorState }) => {
    21	      editorState.read(() => {
    22	        const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey)
    23	        if ($isGridContainerNode(node)) {
    24	          setCurrentCols(node.getCols())
    25	        }
    26	      })
    27	    })
    28	  }, [editor, nodeKey])
    29	
    30	  const handleSetCols = useCallback(
    31	    (cols: number) => {
    32	      editor.update(() => {
    33	        const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey)
    34	        if ($isGridContainerNode(node)) {
    35	          node.setCols(cols)
    36	        }
    37	      })
    38	    },
    39	    [editor, nodeKey],
    40	  )
    41	
    42	  const handleAddRow = useCallback(() => {
    43	    editor.update(() => {
    44	      const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey)
    45	      if (!$isGridContainerNode(node)) return
    46	      const cols = node.getCols()
    47	      for (let i = 0; i < cols; i++) {
    48	        node.append($createParagraphNode())
    49	      }
    50	    })
    51	  }, [editor, nodeKey])
    52	
    53	  const handleRemoveRow = useCallback(() => {
    54	    editor.update(() => {
    55	      const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey)
    56	      if (!$isGridContainerNode(node)) return
    57	      const cols = node.getCols()
    58	      const children = node.getChildren()
    59	      if (children.length <= cols) return
    60	
    61	      const lastRow = children.slice(-cols)
    62	      const allEmpty = lastRow.every(
    63	        (child) => child.getTextContentSize() === 0,
    64	      )
    65	      if (!allEmpty) return
    66	
    67	      for (const child of lastRow) {
    68	        child.remove()
    69	      }
    70	    })
    71	  }, [editor, nodeKey])
    72	
    73	  return (
    74	    <div
    75	      className={cls.toolbarContainer}
    76	      onMouseDown={(e) => e.preventDefault()}
    77	    >
    78	      <span className={cls.toolbarIcon}>
    79	        <LayoutGrid size={14} />
    80	      </span>
    81	      {COL_OPTIONS.map((n) => (
    82	        <button
    83	          key={n}
    84	          type="button"
    85	          className={`${cls.colButton} ${n === currentCols ? cls.colButtonActive : ''}`}
    86	          onClick={() => handleSetCols(n)}
    87	          aria-label={`${n} columns`}
    88	        >
    89	          {n}
    90	        </button>
    91	      ))}
    92	      <div className={cls.toolbarDivider} />
    93	      <button
    94	        type="button"
    95	        className={cls.actionButton}
    96	        onClick={handleAddRow}
    97	        aria-label="Add row"
    98	      >
    99	        <Plus size={14} />
   100	      </button>
   101	      <button
   102	        type="button"
   103	        className={cls.actionButton}
   104	        onClick={handleRemoveRow}
   105	        aria-label="Remove row"
   106	      >
   107	        <Minus size={14} />
   108	      </button>
   109	    </div>
   110	  )
   111	}
```

_**Agent (gpt-5.3-codex 2026-02-16 10:40:20Z)**_

**Findings**
1. High: `GridContainerNode`/`GridEditNode` share a mutable `__cellEditors` array across clones, which breaks Lexical immutability expectations.
`packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/GridContainerNode.ts:64`, `packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/GridContainerNode.ts:82`, `packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/GridContainerNode.ts:115`, `packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/GridContainerNode.ts:136`, `packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/GridContainerNode.ts:150`, `packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/GridEditNode.ts:26`.
This can cause history/undo state corruption because writable-node mutations (`push`/`pop`) affect prior snapshots.

2. Medium: `SerializedGridContainerNode` type contract does not match what `importJSON` actually accepts.
`packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/GridContainerNode.ts:20`, `packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/GridContainerNode.ts:169`, `packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/GridContainerNode.ts:177`, `packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/GridContainerNode.ts:179`, `packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/GridContainerNode.ts:207`, `packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/GridEditNode.ts:50`.
Type says `cells` is required and `gap` is string, but code also accepts legacy `children` and currently-ingested numeric gaps from fixtures (`packages/rich-editor-demo/src/fixtures/presets.ts:651`, `packages/rich-editor-demo/src/fixtures/presets.ts:1168`, `packages/rich-editor-demo/src/fixtures/markdown-test-preset.ts:100`). This weakens type safety and can leak non-string gaps through export.

3. Medium: row-removal emptiness logic is text-only and can delete non-text content.
`packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/GridContainerNode.ts:147`, `packages/rich-editor/src/components/decorators/GridEditDecorator.tsx:74`.
But nested cells allow nodes like `HorizontalRuleNode` (`packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/shared.ts:2`, `packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/shared.ts:22`) that have zero text, so a non-empty row can be treated as empty and removed.

**Open Questions**
1. Is legacy grid JSON (`children` + numeric `gap`) still an officially supported input shape? If yes, I’d formalize it as a union type and normalize on import.
2. For pattern parity, should `AlertQuoteNode` get the same legacy-children fallback that `BannerNode` already has? (`packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/BannerNode.ts:150` vs `packages/rich-editor/src/nodes/AlertQuoteNode.ts:162`)

`pnpm -C packages/rich-editor exec tsc --noEmit` passes. I did not run runtime interaction tests.
